<!DOCTYPE qgis PUBLIC 'http://mrcc.com/qgis.dtd' 'SYSTEM'>
<qgis version="3.44.7-Solothurn">
  <identifier>VI_Named_Watersheds</identifier>
  <parentidentifier></parentidentifier>
  <language>ENG</language>
  <type>dataset</type>
  <title>VI_Named_Watersheds</title>
  <abstract>REQUIRED: A brief narrative summary of the data set.

REQUIRED: A summary of the intentions with which the data set was developed.</abstract>
  <keywords vocabulary="gmd:topicCategory">
    <keyword>REQUIRED: Common-use word or phrase used to describe the subject of the data set.</keyword>
  </keywords>
  <links>
    <link format="" type="ArcSDE Connection" description="" name="SDE Feature Class" size="" url="Server=slkux1.env.gov.bc.ca; Service=idwprod1; User=whse_basemapping; Version=SDE.DEFAULT" mimeType=""/>
  </links>
  <dates/>
  <fees></fees>
  <constraints type="Access">REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for accessing the data set.</constraints>
  <rights>REQUIRED: Restrictions and legal prerequisites for using the data set after access is granted.</rights>
  <encoding></encoding>
  <crs>
    <spatialrefsys nativeFormat="Wkt">
      <wkt>PROJCRS["NAD83 / BC Albers",BASEGEOGCRS["NAD83",DATUM["North American Datum 1983",ELLIPSOID["GRS 1980",6378137,298.257222101,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]]],PRIMEM["Greenwich",0,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433]],ID["EPSG",4269]],CONVERSION["British Columbia Albers",METHOD["Albers Equal Area",ID["EPSG",9822]],PARAMETER["Latitude of false origin",45,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8821]],PARAMETER["Longitude of false origin",-126,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8822]],PARAMETER["Latitude of 1st standard parallel",50,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8823]],PARAMETER["Latitude of 2nd standard parallel",58.5,ANGLEUNIT["degree",0.0174532925199433],ID["EPSG",8824]],PARAMETER["Easting at false origin",1000000,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8826]],PARAMETER["Northing at false origin",0,LENGTHUNIT["metre",1],ID["EPSG",8827]]],CS[Cartesian,2],AXIS["(E)",east,ORDER[1],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],AXIS["(N)",north,ORDER[2],LENGTHUNIT["metre",1]],USAGE[SCOPE["Province-wide spatial data management."],AREA["Canada - British Columbia."],BBOX[48.25,-139.04,60.01,-114.08]],ID["EPSG",3005]]</wkt>
      <proj4>+proj=aea +lat_0=45 +lon_0=-126 +lat_1=50 +lat_2=58.5 +x_0=1000000 +y_0=0 +ellps=GRS80 +towgs84=0,0,0,0,0,0,0 +units=m +no_defs</proj4>
      <srsid>970</srsid>
      <srid>3005</srid>
      <authid>EPSG:3005</authid>
      <description>NAD83 / BC Albers</description>
      <projectionacronym>aea</projectionacronym>
      <ellipsoidacronym>EPSG:7019</ellipsoidacronym>
      <geographicflag>false</geographicflag>
    </spatialrefsys>
  </crs>
  <extent>
    <spatial minx="200000" maxx="1900000" dimensions="2" miny="300000" maxy="1800000" minz="0" maxz="0" crs="EPSG:3005"/>
  </extent>
</qgis>
